extraction.one_line_summary: BISSEGGER Stefan won from the break on a downhill finish, taking the stage after break escaped early and peloton never engaged.
tactical_patterns: Movistar and Groupama-FDJ actively chased break inclusion despite no obvious GC agenda, revealing multi-stage positioning strategy.
Peloton granted break 56 seconds then completely abandoned chase despite single KOM climb, suggesting GC teams saving energy.

rider_signals.BISSEGGER Stefan: positive: Won from break despite slipstream tactical error near finish, showing raw power compensated for poor positioning
rider_signals.BYSTROM Sven Erik: neutral: Third place on Stage 2 yet UAE deployed him in break work, indicating team willing to burn climber early
rider_signals.THOMAS Benjamin: negative: Led through KOM sprint but gapped in final corner suggesting poor technical descending despite positioning advantage
